suffering_zones: Vercors Plateau Grind: Sustained 5600ft accumulation through escarpments and gorges fatigues legs before 13km finale.
Col de la Croix Perrin: 1218m summit early tests power after Cote 2000 descent in thin Vercors air.
Final Tour Climb: 13km to Villard-de-Lans evokes pro suffering on historic paved ramps.

final_verdict.one_liner: Vercors mountain showcase with GFNY polish.
